---
title: "CV_new_event"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-19"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(refund)
library(face)
library(fda)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(nloptr)
```

```{r}
###Step 0: Data Prep
fd_Marathon <- fd_data_full |>
filter(grepl(" Marathon$", id))

fd_Marathon_men_mean <- fd_Marathon %>%
  filter(gender == "men") %>%
  group_by(id, age) %>%
  summarise(result_score = median(result_score), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(id, age) |> 
# keep only athletes with >= 3 observed ages (data points)
  group_by(id) %>%
  filter(n() >= 4) %>%          # drop athletes with < 4 rows
  ungroup()
ids <- unique(fd_Marathon_men_mean$id)
```

```{r}
### split data to 5 folds
set.seed(2026)                 
K_folds <- 5                        

uids  <- unique(fd_Marathon_men_mean$id)         # get unique athlete IDs (keeps each athlete together)
folds <- sample(rep(1:K_folds, length.out = length(uids)))  # assign each athlete to a fold 1..5

id2fold <- data.frame(id = uids, fold = folds)        # lookup table: id -> fold
fd_Marathon_men_mean$fold <- id2fold$fold[match(fd_Marathon_men_mean$id, id2fold$id)]     # attach fold label to every row in df

# Example usage in a CV loop:
fpca_list  <- vector("list", K_folds)
imfun_list <- vector("list", K_folds)
fpca_list_first3 <- vector("list", K_folds)
imfun_list_first3<- vector("list", K_folds)
cv_rows <- vector("list", K_folds)
cv_rows_first3 <- vector("list", K_folds) 
for (f in 1:K_folds) {
  train <- fd_Marathon_men_mean[fd_Marathon_men_mean$fold != f, ]   # TRAIN rows
  test  <- fd_Marathon_men_mean[fd_Marathon_men_mean$fold == f, ]   # TEST rows
  
  train_ids <- unique(train$id)  # IDs in TRAIN fold
  #test_ids  <- unique(test$id) 
  #  IDs in TEST fold
  #find 2 pcs(eigenfunctions) from FPCA
face_input <- train %>%
  transmute(
    y       = result_score,
    argvals = age,
    subj    = id
  )

# Age grid for prediction 
age_grid <- seq(17, 56, by = 1)

fit_face <- face.sparse(face_input, argvals.new = age_grid, calculate.scores = TRUE)
#Smooth eigenfunctions 
pc_fpca <- fit_face$eigenfunctions[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]

# # calculate FPC scores for athletes
########LS scores for 2 FPCA PCs 

K_use <- 2                                # use 2 PCs
tgrid <- fit_face$argvals.new             # training grid (same as age_grid)
mu_g  <- fit_face$mu.new                  # training mean on grid
# write a function to get score using least square(# LS scores for ONE test athlete using TRAIN mean + TRAIN PCs)
get_sc_fpca <- function(t_obs, y_obs) {
  mu_obs  <- approx(tgrid, mu_g,  xout = t_obs, rule = 2)$y                     # mu(t_obs)
  Phi_obs <- sapply(1:K_use, function(k)
    approx(tgrid, pc_fpca[, k], xout = t_obs, rule = 2)$y                          # phi_k(t_obs)
  )                                                                             # n_i x 2
  if (nrow(Phi_obs) < K_use) return(rep(NA_real_, K_use))  # not enough points
  if (qr(Phi_obs)$rank < K_use) return(rep(NA_real_, K_use)) # if rank of Phi_obs is less than 2, then return NA
  as.numeric(qr.coef(qr(Phi_obs), y_obs - mu_obs))    # LS scores
}

#FPCA: compute TEST scores + predict TEST y_hat  [CHANGE: use test + test_ids]
# fpca_scores_2pc <- lapply(test_ids, function(z) {
#   di <- fd_Marathon_men_mean %>% filter(id == z) %>% arrange(age)
#   if (nrow(di) < K_use) return(NULL)
#   sc <- get_sc_fpca(di$age, di$result_score)
#   data.frame(id = z, pc1 = sc[1], pc2 = sc[2])
# }) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()
# 
# z <- fpca_scores_2pc_50$id[1]

# =========================
# FPCA: compute TEST scores + predict TEST y_hat  [CHANGE: use test + test_ids]
# =========================
fpca_pred <- test %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    di <- arrange(.x, age) ###???####

    sc <- get_sc_fpca(di$age, di$result_score)                        # test scores (2 numbers)

    if (anyNA(sc)) {                                                  # if cannot estimate scores
      di$yhat_fpca <- NA_real_
      return(di)
    }

    # predict y_hat at each observed test age using TRAIN mean+PCs
    mu_obs <- approx(tgrid, mu_g, xout = di$age, rule = 2)$y
    phi1   <- approx(tgrid, pc_fpca[,1], xout = di$age, rule = 2)$y
    phi2   <- approx(tgrid, pc_fpca[,2], xout = di$age, rule = 2)$y

    di$yhat_fpca <- mu_obs + sc[1]*phi1 + sc[2]*phi2                  # yhat_test(age)
    di
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
##### first 3 prediction on test set########
fpca_pred_first3 <- test %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    di <- arrange(.x, age)

    if (nrow(di) < 4) {
      di$yhat_fpca <- NA_real_
      return(di)
    }

    sc <- get_sc_fpca(di$age[1:3], di$result_score[1:3])

    mu_obs <- approx(tgrid, mu_g, xout = di$age[-(1:3)], rule = 2)$y
    phi1   <- approx(tgrid, pc_fpca[,1], xout = di$age[-(1:3)], rule = 2)$y
    phi2   <- approx(tgrid, pc_fpca[,2], xout = di$age[-(1:3)], rule = 2)$y

    di$yhat_fpca <- NA_real_
    di$yhat_fpca[-(1:3)] <- mu_obs + sc[1]*phi1 + sc[2]*phi2

    di
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
##############################
fpca_list[[f]]  <- fpca_pred  %>% mutate(fold = f)
fpca_list_first3[[f]]  <- fpca_pred_first3 %>% mutate(fold = f)
##########imfunPCA###################################
###find 2 pc for imfunpca
# basis + fit mean
#build athlete specific right-censoring lists (change for traning set)
grid_start <- max(1, floor(min(train$age, na.rm=TRUE))) #14
grid_end   <- ceiling(max(train$age, na.rm=TRUE))       # 50 
grid_step  <- 1  
make_lists <- function(di) {
  di <- arrange(di, age)
  ages_obs   <- di$age
  scores_obs <- di$result_score
  t_last     <- max(ages_obs)
  c_last     <- scores_obs[which.max(ages_obs)]

  # censored tail ages after the athlete's last observed age
  ages_censor  <- if (t_last < grid_end) seq(t_last + grid_step, grid_end, by = grid_step) 
                 else numeric(0)

  list(
    timepoints = c(ages_obs, ages_censor),
    observed   = c(scores_obs, rep(c_last, length(ages_censor))),
    delta      = c(rep(0, length(ages_obs)), rep(1, length(ages_censor))),
    t_last     = t_last,
    c_last     = c_last
  )
}

lst <- lapply(train_ids, function(z) make_lists(filter(train, id == z)))
timepoints <- lapply(lst, `[[`, "timepoints")
observed   <- lapply(lst, `[[`, "observed")
delta      <- lapply(lst, `[[`, "delta")
#t_last_vec <- sapply(lst, `[[`, "t_last")
#c_last_vec <- sapply(lst, `[[`, "c_last")
### basis + fit mean
K_basis <- 6
spline_basis <- create.bspline.basis(rangeval = c(17, 56), nbasis = K_basis, norder = 4)

meanfit <- findmean(
  observed   = observed,
  timepoints = timepoints,
  delta      = delta,
  minit      = K_basis,
  threshold  = 1e-5
)

#center, then PC1 and PC2
observed_center <- lapply(seq_along(observed), function(i) {
  (observed[[i]] - eval.fd(timepoints[[i]], meanfit$pc_fit))[, 1]
})

pc1s <- first_FPC(rnorm(K_basis), observed_center, timepoints, delta, threshold = 1e-3)

previous_beta <- list(pc1s$beta)
# pc2
pc2s <- third_FPC_conditional(rnorm(K_basis), 2, observed_center, timepoints, delta,
                              betalist = previous_beta, threshold = 1e-3)

# LS scores for ONE test athlete using TRAIN mean + TRAIN PCs
get_sc_imfun <- function(t_obs, y_obs) {
  # mean at observed ages
  mu_obs <- as.numeric(eval.fd(t_obs, meanfit$pc_fit))

  # evaluate eigenfunctions at observed ages: phi_k(t) = B(t)%*%beta_k
  B_obs  <- eval.basis(t_obs, spline_basis)          # n_i x K_basis
  phi1   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc1s$beta)          # n_i
  phi2   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc2s$beta)          # n_i
  Phi    <- cbind(phi1, phi2)                        # n_i x 2
  if (nrow(Phi) < 2) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))           # need ≥2 ages
  if (qr(Phi)$rank < 2) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))        # [ADD] avoid rank deficiency


  # LS scores for (PC1, PC2)
  as.numeric(qr.coef(qr(Phi), y_obs - mu_obs))
}
###
# =========================
# imFunPCA: compute TEST scores + predict TEST y_hat  [ADD]
# =========================
imfun_pred <- test %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    di <- arrange(.x, age)
    sc <- get_sc_imfun(di$age, di$result_score)             # test scores (2 numbers)

    if (anyNA(sc)) {
      di$yhat_imfun <- NA_real_
      return(di)
    }

    # predict y_hat at each observed test age using TRAIN mean+PCs
    mu_obs <- as.numeric(eval.fd(di$age, meanfit$pc_fit))
    B_obs  <- eval.basis(di$age, spline_basis)
    phi1   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc1s$beta)
    phi2   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc2s$beta)

    di$yhat_imfun <- mu_obs + sc[1]*phi1 + sc[2]*phi2
    di
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
##### first 3 prediction on test set########
imfun_pred_first3 <- test %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    di <- arrange(.x, age)

    if (nrow(di) < 4) {
      di$yhat_imfun <- NA_real_
      return(di)
    }

    sc <- get_sc_imfun(di$age[1:3], di$result_score[1:3])

    mu_obs <- as.numeric(eval.fd(di$age[-(1:3)], meanfit$pc_fit))
    B_obs  <- eval.basis(di$age[-(1:3)], spline_basis)
    phi1   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc1s$beta)
    phi2   <- as.numeric(B_obs %*% pc2s$beta)

    di$yhat_imfun <- NA_real_
    di$yhat_imfun[-(1:3)] <- mu_obs + sc[1]*phi1 + sc[2]*phi2

    di
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
######################################
imfun_list[[f]] <- imfun_pred %>% mutate(fold = f)
imfun_list_first3[[f]] <- imfun_pred_first3 %>% mutate(fold = f)
####
# ==================================================
# Compute MAE and MAD following the paper definition
# ==================================================
# ---- build per-row comparison data (TEST only): observed y + both predictions ----
test_pred <- fpca_pred %>%
  dplyr::dplyr::select(id, age, y = result_score, yhat_fpca) %>%          # y = observed test score
  dplyr::left_join(
    imfun_pred %>% dplyr::dplyr::select(id, age, yhat_imfun),             # add imFun predictions
    by = c("id", "age")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(yhat_fpca) & !is.na(yhat_imfun))
####first 3############################
test_pred_first3 <- fpca_pred_first3 %>%
  dplyr::dplyr::select(id, age, y = result_score, yhat_fpca) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    imfun_pred_first3 %>% dplyr::dplyr::select(id, age, yhat_imfun),
    by = c("id","age")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(yhat_fpca) & !is.na(yhat_imfun))
###################################
# Per-athlete errors
err_by_id <- test_pred %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
    fpca_mae_i  = mean(abs(y - yhat_fpca),  na.rm = TRUE),
    fpca_mad_i  = median(abs(y - yhat_fpca), na.rm = TRUE),
    imfun_mae_i = mean(abs(y - yhat_imfun),  na.rm = TRUE),
    imfun_mad_i = median(abs(y - yhat_imfun), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
####first 3############
err_by_id_first3 <- test_pred_first3 %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
    fpca_mae_i  = mean(abs(y - yhat_fpca),  na.rm = TRUE),
    fpca_mad_i  = median(abs(y - yhat_fpca), na.rm = TRUE),
    imfun_mae_i = mean(abs(y - yhat_imfun),  na.rm = TRUE),
    imfun_mad_i = median(abs(y - yhat_imfun), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
#######################
# Now take MEDIAN across athletes (as in paper)
fold_res <- data.frame(
  fold = f,
  fpca_MAE  = median(err_by_id$fpca_mae_i,  na.rm = TRUE),
  fpca_MAD  = median(err_by_id$fpca_mad_i,  na.rm = TRUE),
  imfun_MAE = median(err_by_id$imfun_mae_i, na.rm = TRUE),
  imfun_MAD = median(err_by_id$imfun_mad_i, na.rm = TRUE)
)
cat("fold", f, ": first3 athletes used =", nrow(err_by_id_first3), "\n")

fold_res_first3 <- data.frame(
  fold = f,
  fpca_MAE  = median(err_by_id_first3$fpca_mae_i,  na.rm = TRUE),
  fpca_MAD  = median(err_by_id_first3$fpca_mad_i,  na.rm = TRUE),
  imfun_MAE = median(err_by_id_first3$imfun_mae_i, na.rm = TRUE),
  imfun_MAD = median(err_by_id_first3$imfun_mad_i, na.rm = TRUE)
)

cv_rows_first3[[f]] <- fold_res_first3
cv_rows[[f]] <- fold_res # [ADD] store fold results (create cv_rows <- list() before loop)
###
  cat("fold", f, "stored\n")
  #####
} #### end of loop #########
fpca_pred_all  <- bind_rows(fpca_list)
imfun_pred_all <- bind_rows(imfun_list)
fpca_pred_first3_all  <- bind_rows(fpca_list_first3)
imfun_pred_first3_all <- bind_rows(imfun_list_first3)
###
stopifnot(length(cv_rows) == 5,
          length(cv_rows_first3) == 5,
          length(fpca_list) == 5,
          length(imfun_list) == 5,
          length(fpca_list_first3) == 5,
          length(imfun_list_first3) == 5)

stopifnot(all(1:K_folds %in% unique(fpca_pred_all$fold)),
          all(1:K_folds %in% unique(imfun_pred_all$fold)),
          all(1:K_folds %in% unique(fpca_pred_first3_all$fold)),
          all(1:K_folds %in% unique(imfun_pred_first3_all$fold)))
###
cv_summary <- bind_rows(cv_rows) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(fold = as.character(fold))    # [ADD] combine folds
####first 3##########
cv_summary_first3 <- bind_rows(cv_rows_first3) %>%
  mutate(fold = as.character(fold))

avg_row_first3 <- cv_summary_first3 %>%
  summarise(
    fold = "Average",
    fpca_MAE  = mean(fpca_MAE),
    fpca_MAD  = mean(fpca_MAD),
    imfun_MAE = mean(imfun_MAE),
    imfun_MAD = mean(imfun_MAD)
  )

final_table_first3 <- bind_rows(cv_summary_first3, avg_row_first3) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -fold,
               names_to = c("Method","Metric"),
               names_sep = "_") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Metric, values_from = value)
##################################
# Add average row
avg_row <- cv_summary %>%
  summarise(
    fold = "Average",
    fpca_MAE  = mean(fpca_MAE),
    fpca_MAD  = mean(fpca_MAD),
    imfun_MAE = mean(imfun_MAE),
    imfun_MAD = mean(imfun_MAD)
  )

final_table <- bind_rows(cv_summary, avg_row) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -fold,
               names_to = c("Method","Metric"),
               names_sep = "_") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Metric, values_from = value)

final_table
final_table_first3

```


```{r}
#fold 2 imfun_predict & observed
fold0 <- 2

imfun_big_resid <- imfun_pred_first3_all %>%
  filter(fold == fold0, !is.na(yhat_imfun)) %>%
  mutate(
    resid_imfun = yhat_imfun - result_score,
    abs_resid_imfun = abs(resid_imfun)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_resid_imfun))

imfun_big_resid %>%
  dplyr::select(id, age, result_score, yhat_imfun, resid_imfun, abs_resid_imfun) %>%
  slice(1:20)
```

```{r}
fold2_compare <- fpca_pred_first3_all %>%
  filter(fold == fold0) %>%
  dplyr::select(fold, id, age, y = result_score, yhat_fpca) %>%
  left_join(
    imfun_pred_first3_all %>%
      filter(fold == fold0) %>%
      dplyr::select(fold, id, age, yhat_imfun),
    by = c("fold", "id", "age")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(yhat_fpca) & !is.na(yhat_imfun)) %>%
  mutate(
    abs_fpca  = abs(yhat_fpca - y),
    abs_imfun = abs(yhat_imfun - y)
  )

fold2_compare %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(
    fpca_mae  = mean(abs_fpca),
    imfun_mae = mean(abs_imfun),
    mae_diff  = imfun_mae - fpca_mae,
    n_pred    = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mae_diff)) %>%
  slice(1:20)
##############
fold2_compare %>%
  mutate(diff = abs_imfun - abs_fpca) %>%
  ggplot(aes(age, diff)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  labs(
    title = "Fold 2 first-3: |error_imfun| - |error_fpca| vs age",
    x = "Age being predicted",
    y = "|error_imfun| - |error_fpca|"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
fold0 <- 2

diag_df <- fpca_pred_first3_all %>%
  filter(fold == fold0) %>%
  dplyr::select(fold, id, age, y = result_score, yhat_fpca) %>%
  left_join(
    imfun_pred_first3_all %>%
      filter(fold == fold0) %>%
      dplyr::select(fold, id, age, yhat_imfun),
    by = c("fold", "id", "age")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    abs_fpca  = abs(yhat_fpca - y),
    abs_imfun = abs(yhat_imfun - y)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(id, age, abs_fpca, abs_imfun) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(abs_fpca, abs_imfun),
               names_to = "method", values_to = "abs_err") %>%
  mutate(method = recode(method,
                         abs_fpca = "fpca",
                         abs_imfun = "imfun")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(abs_err))

ggplot(diag_df, aes(age, abs_err)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~method) +
  labs(
    title = "Fold 2 first-3: absolute error vs age",
    x = "Age being predicted",
    y = "|predicted - observed|"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```





```{r}
#individual test players' aging curve(imfunpca)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

fold_to_plot <- 1

plot_dat <- imfun_pred_first3_all %>%
  filter(fold == fold_to_plot) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  arrange(age, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    point_order = row_number(),
    used_for_score = point_order <= 3,
    predict_target = point_order > 3
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = age, group = id)) +
  # observed curves for all athletes
  geom_line(aes(y = result_score), color = "black", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = result_score), color = "black", alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +

  # first 3 observed points used for score estimation
  geom_point(
    data = subset(plot_dat, used_for_score),
    aes(y = result_score),
    color = "red",
    size = 2
  ) +

  # predicted later points only
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_dat, predict_target),
    aes(y = yhat_imfun),
    color = "blue",
    alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(plot_dat, predict_target),
    aes(y = yhat_imfun),
    color = "blue",
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 1.2
  ) +

  labs(
    title = paste("Fold", fold_to_plot, ": all test athletes in one plot"),
    subtitle = "Black = observed, red = first 3 points used for score estimation, blue dashed = imFun predicted later points",
    x = "Age",
    y = "result_score"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
```{r}
#individual test players' aging curve(FPCA)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

fold_to_plot <- 1

plot_dat <- fpca_pred_first3_all %>%
  filter(fold == fold_to_plot) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  arrange(age, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    point_order = row_number(),
    used_for_score = point_order <= 3,
    predict_target = point_order > 3
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = age, group = id)) +
  # observed curves for all athletes
  geom_line(aes(y = result_score), color = "black", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = result_score), color = "black", alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +

  # first 3 observed points used for score estimation
  geom_point(
    data = subset(plot_dat, used_for_score),
    aes(y = result_score),
    color = "red",
    size = 2
  ) +

  # predicted later points only
  geom_line(
    data = subset(plot_dat, predict_target),
    aes(y = yhat_fpca),
    color = "blue",
    alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(plot_dat, predict_target),
    aes(y = yhat_fpca),
    color = "blue",
    alpha = 0.7,
    size = 1.2
  ) +

  labs(
    title = paste("Fold", fold_to_plot, ": all test athletes in one plot"),
    subtitle = "Black = observed, red = first 3 points used for score estimation, blue dashed = fpca predicted later points",
    x = "Age",
    y = "result_score"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
